ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – Friday, 6th October
ham.body:
Hi everyone,

Just a friendly reminder that the semester project due date is this Friday, 6th October. Please submit your final report via the course portal by 11:59 PM. Attach your code and documentation.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.

Thanks,
Professor Smith

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Verification
spam.body:
Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to you regarding an urgent matter that requires your immediate attention. As part of our current promotion strategy, you have been allocated a corporate gift card that must be redeemed before the end of the day.

Please click the link below to confirm your receipt and avoid any penalties:

<URL>

If this request is not completed within 30 minutes, your account will be flagged for non‑compliance and may face a temporary suspension.

Thank you for your swift cooperation.

Best regards,
[CEO Name]
